TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pacuya, title = Pacuya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacuya} }

S.FORM: alang Pacuya ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 101 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 56% kyan ku 57 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 44% kyan ku 44 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, Bunun 19%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pacuya hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Pacuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pacuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacuya hya' ga Ancoh. tay mkyahu' na Pacuya hya' ga Cihalaay. tay 'zil na Pacuya hya' ga Cirakesay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pacuya ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pacuya ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pacuya ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 101 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 56% kyan ku 57 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 44% kyan ku 44 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 36%, Bunun 19%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pacuya hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Pacuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pacuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pacuya hya' ga Ancoh. tay mkyahu' na Pacuya hya' ga Cihalaay. tay 'zil na Pacuya hya' ga Cirakesay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pacuya ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pacuya ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paʦ~ʨuja ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na paʦ~ʨuja ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na paʦ~ʨuja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʦ~ʨuja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paʦ~ʨuja ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na paʦ~ʨuja ħjaʔ ɣa anʦ~ʨoħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʦ~ʨuja ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiħalaaj. taj ʔzil na paʦ~ʨuja ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ paʦ~ʨuja ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ paʦ~ʨuja ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
